name: open_netlist_design
short_description: Open a synthesis or netlist design
full_help:
open_netlist_design

Description: 
Open a synthesis or netlist design

Syntax: 
open_netlist_design  [-name <arg>] [-run <arg>] [-part <arg>]
                     [-constrset <arg>] [-top <arg>] [-mode <arg>] [-quiet]
                     [-verbose]

Returns: 
design object

Usage: 
  Name          Description
  -------------------------
  [-name]       Design name
  [-run]        Run to open into the netlist design
  [-part]       Target part
  [-constrset]  Constraint fileset to use
  [-top]        Specify the top module name when the structural netlist is 
                Verilog
  [-mode]       The design mode. Values: default, out_of_context
                Default: default
  [-quiet]      Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]    Suspend message limits during command execution

Categories: 
Project
